chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2247 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 04.02.2026 Mr. Sikandar Ali Kolachi, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, APG ------------------------------------------- Mr. Sikandar Ali Kolachi, learned counsel for applicant/accused, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction for disposal of this case expeditiously. Learned A.P.G. has recorded no objection on such proposal. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, with direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant expeditiously, preferably within two months. J U D G E Gusher/PS
